title: helichrysum altigenum
intro: Helichrysum altigenum, also known as the annual or dwarf curry plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum altigenum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as essential oils and tinctures, can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
